Delegates
LoopStartedOperation
public delegate void LoopStartedOperation(
object 
sender
)

The loop that checks for updates every now and again has started

Parameter
sender
object

the object that initiated the call

LoopFinishedOperation
public delegate void LoopFinishedOperation(
object 
sender,
bool 
updateRequired
)

The loop that checks for updates has finished checking for updates

Parameters
sender
object

the object that initiated the call

updateRequired
bool

true if an update is required; false otherwise

UpdateDetected
public delegate void UpdateDetected(
object 
sender,
UpdateDetectedEventArgs 
e
)

An update was detected for the user's currently running software.  If both this and UpdateDetectedAsync are implemented, UpdateDetectedAsync is prioritized.

Parameters
sender
object

the object that initiated the call

e
UpdateDetectedEventArgs

Information about the update that was detected

UpdateDetectedAsync
public delegate Task UpdateDetectedAsync(
object 
sender,
UpdateDetectedEventArgs 
e
)

An update was detected for the user's currently running software.  If both this and UpdateDetected are implemented, UpdateDetectedAsync is prioritized.

Parameters
sender
object

the object that initiated the call

e
UpdateDetectedEventArgs

Information about the update that was detected

UpdateCheckStarted
public delegate void UpdateCheckStarted(
object 
sender
)

SparkleUpdater has started checking for updates

Parameter
sender
object

The SparkleUpdater instance that is checking for an update.

UpdateCheckFinished
public delegate void UpdateCheckFinished(
object 
sender,
UpdateStatus 
status
)

SparkleUpdater has finished checking for updates

Parameters
sender
object

SparkleUpdater that finished checking for an update.

status
UpdateStatus

Update status (e.g. whether an update is available)

CancelEventHandlerAsync
public delegate Task CancelEventHandlerAsync(
object 
sender,
CancelEventArgs 
e
)

An asynchronous cancel event handler.

Parameters
sender
object

The source of the event.

e
CancelEventArgs

A System.ComponentModel.CancelEventArgs that contains the event data.

CloseApplication
public delegate void CloseApplication()

Delegate for custom application shutdown logic

CloseApplicationAsync
public delegate Task CloseApplicationAsync()

Async version of CloseApplication().  Delegate for custom application shutdown logic

DownloadEvent
public delegate void DownloadEvent(
AppCastItem 
item,
string 
path
)

A delegate for download events (start, canceled). Make sure to check that the path is valid in case this is called when the path is unknown/unset for some reason (e.g. failed before download began).

DownloadFromPathToPathEvent
public delegate void DownloadFromPathToPathEvent(
object 
sender,
string 
from,
string 
to
)

A delegate for download events (start, canceled) with just a path.  Make sure to check that the path is valid in case this is called when the path is unknown/unset for some reason (e.g. failed before download began).

DownloadProgressEvent
public delegate void DownloadProgressEvent(
object 
sender,
ItemDownloadProgressEventArgs 
args
)

Delegate that provides information about some download progress that has been made

Parameters
sender
object

The object that initiated the event

args
ItemDownloadProgressEventArgs

The information on how much data has been downloaded and how much needs to be downloaded

ItemDownloadProgressEvent
public delegate void ItemDownloadProgressEvent(
object 
sender,
AppCastItem 
item,
ItemDownloadProgressEventArgs 
args
)

Delegate that provides information about some download progress that has been made when downloading a specific AppCastItem.

Parameters
sender
object

The object that initiated the event

item
AppCastItem

The item that is being downloaded

args
ItemDownloadProgressEventArgs

The information on how much data has been downloaded and how much needs to be downloaded

UserRespondedToUpdate
public delegate void UserRespondedToUpdate(
object 
sender,
UpdateResponseEventArgs 
e
)

A handler called when the user responsed to an available update

Parameters
sender
object

The object that initiated the event

e
UpdateResponseEventArgs

An UpdateResponse object that contains the information on how the user responded to the available update (e.g. skip, remind me later). Be warned that UpdateResponseEventArgs.UpdateItem might be null.

DownloadErrorEvent
public delegate void DownloadErrorEvent(
AppCastItem 
item,
string? 
path,
Exception 
exception
)

A delegate for a download error that occurred for some reason

Parameters
item
AppCastItem

The item that is being downloaded

path
string?

The path to the place where the file was being downloaded (null if not available for some reason)

exception
Exception

The  that occurred to cause the error

RedirectHandler
public delegate bool RedirectHandler(
string 
fromURL,
string 
toURL,
HttpResponseMessage 
responseMessage
)

A delegate for a handling redirects from one URL to another URL manually

Parameters
fromURL
string

The original URL that was going to be downloaded from

toURL
string

The location that the redirect is pointing to

responseMessage
HttpResponseMessage

The  for the response from the server

BeforeBeginInstallerProcess
public delegate bool BeforeBeginInstallerProcess(
Process 
process,
string 
downloadFilePath
)

A delegate to allow users to modify/see the installer process before it actually begins.  Return true to keep the installer process going, return false to have SparkleUpdater not run the installer (you can choose not to run it at all or run it yourself after that).

Parameters
process
Process

The installer process about to be started

downloadFilePath
string

The path to the downloaded installer that will be started by the new process

Returns

true if the installer should continue, false to not start the installer automatically

InstallUpdateFailure
public delegate bool InstallUpdateFailure(
InstallUpdateFailureReason 
failureReason,
string? 
installPath
)

Delegate that tells a user why the update installation failed

Parameters
failureReason
InstallUpdateFailureReason

reason for failure

installPath
string?

Path for installer (can be null)

Returns

Result is unused; return whatever you like. This was a mistake in the 3.0 release.  This will be changed in a future version to `void`.
